subject: polish(tests+setup): apply findings from parallel cold/tests/comments/race audits
body:
Ran four triggers in parallel (cold, race, tests, comments) against the
branch. Three returned with actionable findings; one minor pre-existing
race is tracked in TODO.

Applied:
- HeadingInput.test.tsx: switched getByTestId('h') to the semantic
  getByRole('textbox'), matching the rest of the suite's accessibility-
  query discipline (tests flagged the one exception).
- ContractUploadPreview.test.tsx: removed unused `within` import + its
  `void within` suppression. Import-and-suppress is the anti-pattern
  the tests audit caught.
- ToneSelector.tsx: added an inline comment explaining why `#FFFFFF`
  is hardcoded (WCAG AA guarantee across all 16 TONE_PALETTE entries,
  cross-referencing the CLAUDE.md exceptions table). Cold audit asked
  for this so readers don't hunt the exception table for a hex value
  whose reason isn't obvious at the call site.
- __tests__/setup.ts: extended the HTMLDialogElement close shim to
  accept an optional returnValue and set `this.returnValue` before
  firing the close event. jsdom-complete behavior for a future consumer
  that reads returnValue; no existing consumer does, so no test change.
- Modal.test.tsx: replaced the three `document.querySelector('dialog')
  as HTMLDialogElement` casts with a querySelector + null-throw guard.
  If the component stops rendering a dialog, tests now fail with a
  helpful error instead of crashing on `.close()` against null.

Tracked in TODO (not fixed inline):
- TemplateSelector.handleFileSelect has a narrow stale-closure race on
  `splitSubSections` across the parseDocument await. Pre-existing, not
  introduced by the reduction epic, narrow user-visible impact
  (re-toggling in preview state re-splits correctly). Race trigger
  audit flagged it; fix requires either a ref-read pattern or a
  setter-callback split. Left as a follow-up.

Comments audit: zero violations. Trigger reports "Branch is ready.
Land with confidence."

Tests verified: 20 files / 155 passing. tsc -b clean, eslint clean.

Tags: testing, polish, audit
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: custom-code-reduction
Semver: patch
